property.name: browser.fullName
property.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/147.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

testcase.name: SponsorList should create
SponsorList should call fetchCurrentSeason on init
SponsorList should map sponsorProfileId to id for BaseList compatibility
SponsorList should expose empty list before HTTP response arrives
SponsorList should handle an empty HTTP response
SponsorList should set isLoading to false after successful response
SponsorList should set isLoading to false and keep sponsors empty on HTTP error
SponsorList should define a spoName column
SponsorList should define a lastSeasonDescription column
SponsorList should show all sponsors when no filter is active
SponsorList should filter sponsors by name substring
SponsorList should filter sponsors by name case-insensitively
SponsorList should return no results when name filter matches nothing
SponsorList should show all sponsors when name filter is cleared
SponsorList should show no sponsors when currentSeasonOnly is true and season is not loaded
SponsorList should show all sponsors when currentSeasonOnly is false regardless of season
SponsorList should filter to only current-season sponsors when currentSeasonOnly is true
SponsorList should exclude sponsors with no season history when currentSeasonOnly is true
SponsorList should exclude past-season-only sponsors when currentSeasonOnly is true
SponsorList should reactively update when currentSeason signal changes
SponsorList should apply name and currentSeasonOnly filters together
SponsorList should return nothing when name matches a past-season sponsor with currentSeasonOnly active
